resonance_events.excerpt: Jagan said that on Arunachala, your sweat removes bad karma.

resonance_events.excerpt: By now I was sweating profusely... the clear day means we are in full sun.

resonance_events.excerpt: Walking sticks are quite good when going up and down the mountain.
